SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.electrolyzer

Enum Class ElectrolyzerTechnology

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ElectrolyzerTechnology>
neqsim.process.equipment.electrolyzer.ElectrolyzerTechnology
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ElectrolyzerTechnology>, Constable
public enum ElectrolyzerTechnology extends Enum<ElectrolyzerTechnology>
Water-electrolyzer technology selector with typical operating-point defaults.

Defaults are taken from the IRENA Hydrogen Decarbonisation Pathways report (2022) and Buttler & Spliethoff, Renewable and Sustainable Energy Reviews 82 (2018) 2440-2454. They cover the commercially relevant water-electrolysis technologies and the SOEC research demonstrators.

  • PEM - proton-exchange-membrane, 60-80 °C, current density 1.5-2.5 A/cm², cell voltage ~1.8 V, specific energy ~52 kWh/kgH2.
  • ALKALINE - liquid KOH, 70-90 °C, current density 0.2-0.5 A/cm², cell voltage ~1.85 V, specific energy ~50 kWh/kgH2.
  • SOEC - solid-oxide electrolysis cell, 700-850 °C, current density ~1 A/cm², cell voltage ~1.3 V, specific energy ~40 kWh/kgH2 (electricity only).
  • AEM - anion-exchange-membrane, 50-70 °C, intermediate properties.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    AEM
    Anion-exchange-membrane electrolysis (emerging).
    ALKALINE
    Liquid-alkaline (KOH) electrolysis.
    PEM
    Proton-exchange-membrane electrolysis.
    SOEC
    Solid-oxide electrolysis cell (high-temperature steam electrolysis).

    • valueOf

      public static ElectrolyzerTechnology valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getDefaultTemperatureC

      public double getDefaultTemperatureC()
      Get the typical stack temperature for this technology.
      Returns:
      temperature (Celsius)

    • getDefaultPressureBara

      public double getDefaultPressureBara()
      Get the typical stack pressure for this technology.
      Returns:
      pressure (bara)

    • getDefaultFaradaicEfficiency

      public double getDefaultFaradaicEfficiency()
      Get the typical faradaic (current) efficiency for this technology. Equals the fraction of the stack current that actually splits water (the rest is lost to leakage, crossover, parasitic reactions). PEM and alkaline typically 0.6-0.7; SOEC approaches 0.9 because thermal energy partially substitutes for electricity.
      Returns:
      faradaic efficiency (dimensionless, 0..1)
